title: Raccoon Removal in North Castle, NY | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in North Castle, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving North Castle estates and properties. Call today for a free quote!
intro: North Castle residents face unique wildlife challenges due to the town's wooded landscapes and spacious properties that attract raccoons seeking shelter and food. Our professional raccoon removal services provide humane, effective solutions for homeowners dealing with raccoons in attics, crawl spaces, and around their properties. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal in North Castle, from initial inspection to complete exclusion and sanitation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to North Castle, combining humane removal techniques with long-term prevention strategies. Our licensed technicians understand the specific raccoon behavior patterns in Westchester County and provide guaranteed results with transparent pricing from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of your infestation.
localContext: North Castle's blend of historic estates, modern subdivisions like Banksville and Armonk, and proximity to natural areas like Westmoreland Sanctuary creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The town's large properties with mature trees, stone walls, and outbuildings provide numerous entry points and nesting opportunities that require expert assessment and exclusion work.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in North Castle, NY?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in North Castle typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, accessibility of the affected areas, extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. Properties with attic infestations or multiple entry points generally require more extensive services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all North Castle residents.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in North Castle neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in North Castle due to the town's wooded character, large residential lots, and proximity to natural habitats. Areas like Armonk, Banksville, and properties near Westmoreland Sanctuary frequently experience raccoon activity, especially during spring when mothers seek denning sites for their young. The abundance of food sources from gardens, bird feeders, and outdoor pet food also attracts raccoons to North Castle properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my North Castle home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include nocturnal scratching or thumping sounds in attics or walls, tipped-over garbage cans, damaged roof vents or soffits, visible paw prints around your property, and droppings in concentrated areas. You may also notice torn insulation, damaged ductwork, or strong odors if raccoons have been nesting in your attic for an extended period. North Castle's older homes with traditional construction are particularly vulnerable to raccoon entry through chimney caps and roof junctions.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my North Castle property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to North Castle service calls within 24 hours for initial inspection and can begin trapping immediately if raccoons are present. Complete removal usually takes 3-10 days depending on the number of animals and whether there are young present. Baby raccoons require special handling during spring months (March-June), and our technicians ensure all animals are humanely removed before sealing entry points to prevent future intrusions.
